page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re4.20xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance based on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 CPU architecture with 80 dedicated physical cores and 80 vCPUs, operating with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. This dedicated CPU allocation ensures that compute resources are not shared with other tenants, providing consistent processing capabilities.

The instance is equipped with 960.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 12.0 GB per core. This substantial memory capacity is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 15 Gbps. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage.

Given its high memory density and dedicated core allocation, the ecs.re4.20xlarge is designed for memory-intensive workloads. It is highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, heavy caching layers, and complex data analytics pipelines that require massive datasets to reside entirely in RAM.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re4.20xlarge is a memory-optimized instance built on the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It features 80 dedicated physical cores and 80 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading. The instance is configured with 960.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 12.0 GB per core. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 15 Gbps. It does not contain local storage or onboard GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, including large in-memory databases, caching layers, and big data analytics.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring eighty dedicated physical cores and nearly one terabyte of system memory for demanding enterprise workloads.
